title: AST Criminal Trespass 2nd, Disorderly Conduct, & Resisting Arrest: Fairbanks [AK20102411]
incident_type: Criminal Trespass 2nd, Disorderly Conduct, & Resisting Arrest
summary: On 12/28/2020 at 1839 hours the Alaska State Troopers in Fairbanks received a request for a subject removal at a gas station on College Road in Fairbanks. Troopers contacted Olesa Zagharova, age 39 from Fairbanks who refused to leave the gas station. Zagharova attempted to fight with the Trooper on scene during the arrest. Zagharova was arrested for Criminal Trespass 2nd, Disorderly Conduct, and Resisting Arrest and remanded to FCC where she was released on her own recognizance once sober. Alcohol was considered to be a contributing factor.

incident_type: Failure to Stop, DWLR, Reckless Driving, Theft, MIC2,4,5. MIW3, VCOR
summary: On 12/28/2020 the Alaska State Troopers were on patrol in Houston Alaska. A Trooper attempted to stop a gray sedan for driving 9 MPH over the Posted Speed in a 45 MPH zone on the Parks Highway near mile 57. The driver of the sedan failed to stop at the direction of the Trooper and the Trooper pursued the vehicle southbound. Another Trooper was able to spike the vehicle near the Gorilla Fireworks stand at mile 52 of the Parks Highway. The spike was successful, but the vehicle continued to travel southbound towards Wasilla on rims. Eventually the vehicle lost control and crashed into the ditch at mile 48.5 of the Parks Highway. Investigation revealed that Michael Flores, age 29, was in an argument with his girlfriend and hit her in the side with a blunt object causing minor injury. When Michael’s mother told him to leave the residence, he stabbed her in the throat with an unknown pointed object. Michael fled the scene before Troopers arrived. His mother was transported to Mat-Su Regional Medical Center by EMS and is expected to survive. Michae

title: AST Landslide SAR: Haines [AK20093211]
summary: Update 12/7: The Alaska State Troopers has suspended active search operations for David Simmons, age 30 of Haines and Janae Larson, age 23 of Haines due to continued rain and the likelihood of additional landslides in the area. Ground searchers deployed to Haines with the Troopers departed the area today aboard the P/V Enforcer. An Alaska State Trooper Sergeant from Juneau will remain in Haines to coordinate with the incident commander and Haines Borough Police Department on the ongoing disaster relief efforts. If new information or evidence is located Troopers will reevaluate search efforts at that time. The Alaska Department of Public Safety has added Simmons and Larson to the Alaska Missing Persons Clearinghouse list. Update 12/4/20: Search efforts continue today for David Simmons, age
